question_html:
Write a meaningful sentence of your own with each of the following words:

Grief, Freedom, Gratitude, Movement, Negotiation
solution_html:
Grief- The grief of the flood-affected people knows no bounds.

Freedom-Every nation cherishes freedom.

Gratitude- She expressed her gratitude in a civilized manner.

Movement- There is no movement in his arm.

Negotiation- Negotiation is a key element of successful foreign policy.

Mark distribution:

For making meaningful correct sentences; (0.5× 5) = 2.5 marks.

question_html:
Change the following words into verb:

Width, Blessing, Consumption, Power, Denial
solution_html:
Width – Widen ;

Blessing – Bless ;

Consumption – Consume ;

Power – Empower ;

Denial – Deny

Mark Distribution:

For changing the following words into verbs (0.5× 5) = 2.5 marks.

question_html: Write a paragraph on “Etiquette and Manners” within 100 words.
solution_html:
Etiquette and Manners

Etiquette and manners are important in every part of life. They help people show respect and care for one another. Saying “please,” “thank you,” and “sorry” are simple but powerful ways to be polite. Good table manners, like chewing with your mouth closed, also show respect. In many cultures, greeting others properly is a sign of good manners. Listening without interrupting shows that you value what others say. Holding the door open or offering help are small acts of kindness. Manners also include respecting personal space and being on time. Etiquette can be different across cultures, but kindness is universal. Practicing good manners builds trust and strong relationships.

Mark Distribution:

* For writing the Title "Etiquette and Manners" – 0.5 mark.

*For describing basic polite behaviors and gestures – 01 mark.

(Examples include: Saying “please” and “thank you” Table manners like chewing with mouth closed Proper greetings, Listening politely.)

*For describing how etiquette and manners reflect respect and kindness in social interactions – 1.5 marks.

(Look for explanations such as: Showing respect and care, helping others or holding doors open, Respecting personal space and time, Cultural differences in manners but universal kindness.)

*For describing the importance of etiquette and manners in building relationships and society – 02 marks.

(Points might include: Building trust and strong relationships, Creating a positive environment,

Encouraging cooperation and harmony, Reflecting maturity and social responsibility.)

Instructions:

*Students must write it within one single paragraph.

If it becomes more than one paragraph, 50% of the deserved marks will be deducted.

*The response must be within 100 words. If it exceeds 100 words, 0.5 marks will be deducted from the deserved marks.

*For every 3 grammar/spelling mistakes, 01 mark will be deducted.
